channel.title: 战况追踪 — Global Conflict Monitor
channel.description: 实时追踪全球主要冲突态势，多源聚合情报

item.title: [俄乌战争] MINISTRY → CARGO SHIP : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Odessa, Odes'ka Oblast, Ukraine)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: MINISTRY / CARGO SHIP. Location: Odessa, Odes'ka Oblast, Ukraine. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 10 sources.

item.title: [美伊对峙] IRAN → nan : Fight with artillery and tanks (China)
item.description: GDELT Event: Fight with artillery and tanks. Actors: IRAN / nan. Location: China. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 6 sources.

item.title: [美伊对峙] IRAN → THE US : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Sirik, Hormozgan, Iran)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: IRAN / THE US. Location: Sirik, Hormozgan, Iran. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 5 sources.

item.title: [俄乌战争] RUSSIA → TERRORIST ORGANIZATION : Impose administrative sanctions, not specified below (Stavropol, Stavropol'skiy Kray, Russia)
item.description: GDELT Event: Impose administrative sanctions, not specified below. Actors: RUSSIA / TERRORIST ORGANIZATION. Location: Stavropol, Stavropol'skiy Kray, Russia. Goldstein Scale: -5.0. Mentioned in 10 sources.
